messages.author: swarm
messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Proactive Telegram alert before the swarm's disk fills (ENOSPC early warning)
What it solves: WHY: A full disk is the failure the swarm cannot self-heal from — agents
crash mid-write, handoff parcels / topic records / concierge state get
truncated, git fails, and the logs that would explain it can't be written.
The ask is a cheap periodic early warning, BEFORE the cliff.
How it works: Free space crossing WARN/CRITICAL downward delivers exactly one alert for that level, naming the mount + free amount + percent

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: NeedsApproval: BL-412 - threshold via env, which would post a real "DISK WARN/CRITICAL"-looking message into the live Operator's Telegram thread. Given this swarm had a ⏵⏵ bypass permissions on (shift+tab to cycle) · instal…
